theme.description: Solo product spotlight with cinematic price reveal. Dark forest green atmosphere, electric lime savings callout, slam-entry price typography. Each product gets a 10-second solo stage: category chip drops, identity reveals via SplitText, original price strikes through, new price slams in at 2.2x scale, savings badge snaps in rotated.

entrance.description: Glow bloom, chip drop, brand slide, image arrival

identity.description: Rule draw, product name SplitText reveal

price_drama.description: WAS price, strike-through, NOW label, price slam, savings badge

living_moment.description: Float, glow pulse, badge pulse, particles

exit.description: Staggered left exit, product slides right, fade
